creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
usr.sbin/crunch/examples/really-big.conf for instance contains a number of programs and their dependencies, which I doubt is still valid today (especially the comment about "This produces a 4608000 byte binary.").

fixit.conf references fixit floppies, which is a sysinstall legacy concept not carried forward in a post-bsdinstall world.
